meaning: n.灏忓眿,鏈夊噳鍙扮殑灞嬪瓙
examples: "That was our future and our pride at that time," Cabana recalls.

Many smoking parents purchased expensive air filters that have what Cabana called "questionable utility.
An airy living room overlooks the pool and outdoor entertaining area that features a cabana.
Poolside spa treatments are an option as is a private meal in a poolside cabana.
